items.title: Hotel Management System
items.description: Full-stack web application for SEWWANDI Hotel enabling online room booking, event planning, and management features for employee salaries, inventory, and customer payments.

items.title: Online Kids Learning Mobile Application
items.description: Android-based educational mobile app for school children with e-learning platform and online book/newspaper purchasing capabilities.

items.title: Online Shopping Web Application
items.description: Feature-rich e-commerce web application with RESTful services, payment processing, and order delivery management.

items.title: Conference Management System
items.description: Comprehensive full-stack web application for managing online conferences with authorization, registration, payments, and attendee management.

items.title: People's Wave Mobile Application
items.description: Redesigned mobile application with enhanced user interfaces and engaging user experience.

items.title: Fuel Station Mobile Application
items.description: Mobile application for managing fuel station operations and customer queue details.

items.title: Mobile Zone Web Application
items.description: Full-stack web application for selling mobile phones and accessories with seamless shopping experience.

items.title: ProcMan Web & Mobile Application
items.description: Comprehensive procurement management system for construction sites with web and mobile interfaces.

items.title: Resume Ranker
items.description: 4th-year research project focusing on ranking resumes based on technical skills using AI/ML techniques.
